title: UPSERT does not work like PostgreSQL
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1(a Int32, b Int32, c Int32, d Int32) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY a;
ALTER TABLE t1 ADD INDEX idx_b (b) TYPE minmax;
INSERT INTO t1(a, b, c, d) VALUES(1, 2, 3, 4);
INSERT INTO t1(a, b, c, d) VALUES(2, 2, 33, 44) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE c = 33;
key_bug_features: ON CONFLICT(b) DO UPDATE SET c=excluded.c
